name: Scottie Resources Corp.
description: Scottie Resources Corp. is a junior gold-silver explorer focused on the Scottie Gold Mine property and adjacent claims in British Columbia's Golden Triangle, a 500 km mineralized belt containing over 130 million ounces of gold. The company's past-producing Scottie Gold Mine generated 95,426 ounces of gold at an average grade of 16.2 g/t and retains significant underground infrastructure, with an approximate C$240 million market capitalization.
